full_text:
Zheng Wen 鄭文
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zheng Wen (鄭文). Officer under Sima Yi. Falsesly surrendered to Kongming. Executed by Kongming. Zheng Wen is a fictional character. Zheng Wen was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Zheng Wen lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
